title: Nonessential Equipment Storage and Disposal Facility 456
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Nonessential Equipment Storage and Disposal Facility 456''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] equipment depository on [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]]. It was situated on a high desert plateau where it never rained. It was guarded by an eight-man squad of troops (under the leadership of [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Nanda (sergeant)|Nanda]]), armed [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] engineers, and four [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[watch-beast]]s.

The depository stored old [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], [[juggernaut]]s, tanks, [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]], droids, and various spare parts. It also stored vital [[Starship/Legends|starship]] repair parts, which were eventually stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Infiltrators/Legends|Infiltrators]] disguised as Imperial recruits. The Rebels used a [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] [[SuperHaul]] cargo hauler skiff, which they also stole from the Empire, to transport the stolen goods to their designated pick-up point.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|You're in the Army Now!|reprint=1}}
